1.speaker: female
1.text: Heng zawng zawng hi a tak lo vek ni ta se.

1.speaker: female
1.text: Mu tawh zawk la eng nge ang ang.

1.speaker: female
1.text: Ka hria alawm. Kha tak kha a ni min tibuaitu chu.

1.speaker: female
1.text: Simulation-ah hian lo awm ta reng ila.

1.speaker: female
1.text: A nih chuan tuemaw hian kan chips ei vel mai mai en nan hian processing power an va khawhral nasa awm ve.

1.speaker: female
1.text: Kha kha chiah kha a ni an duh dan tur chu.

1.speaker: female
1.text: A nih, eng atan nge an hman a?

1.speaker: female
1.text: Thiana, tumahin an zirchiang lo che. Hoodie inang chiah vawi thum i lei tawh kha.

1.speaker: female
1.text: Kha kha a ni mai thei asin an zir duh chu.

1.speaker: female
1.text: Ka thei lo, ka ngaihtuah reng mai.

1.speaker: female
1.text: I ngaihtuah a nih pawhin thawm dim deuhin ngaihtuah rawh.

2.speaker: female
2.text: A nih, mahse lo ngaithla hle teh.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Minute sawm li chiah ka ngaithla tawh che.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Simulation enkawltu hi ramdang mi (aliens) lo ni ta lo se.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Aw le.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Keimahni hi ni ta zawk ila.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Keimahni maw?

2.speaker: female
2.text: Hmaihlam hun ami keimahni hi. Mihringte, nakin fe ami tur hi.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Chuan keimahni leh keimahni kan lo in-simulate a maw?

2.speaker: female
2.text: Thleng tawh hnu ami keimahni hmangin mawle.

2.speaker: female
2.text: A va han awm lo ve.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Hun hi tluang taka kal (linear) a nih loh chuan a awm thei alawm.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Hun chu a tluang alawm. Dar kua leh minute sawmpanga a ni tawh a. Minute khat kal ta kha dar kua leh minute sawm pali a ni. A tluang alawm.

2.speaker: female
2.text: I sana-ah chauh a nih kha.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Sana tinah a ni.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Kha kha simulation-in a sawitir che a nih kha.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Aw Lalpa leh.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Hun hma-leh-hnu.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Eng nge chu chu a awmzia pawh?

2.speaker: female
2.text: Rough draft kan ni a. Anni chuan an lo nung tawh a. Keini hi a replay kan ni mai.

2.speaker: female
2.text: Replay chauh ka nih chuan ka pawisa min pe let rawh se.

3.speaker: female
3.text: A nih, i sawi chu a dikah lo ngai ta ila.

3.speaker: female
3.text: A dik reng alawm.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Simulation chu lo ni ta se, chuan eng nge?

3.speaker: female
3.text: Eng nge 'chuan eng nge' i tih chu a awmzia?

3.speaker: female
3.text: Thawhlehni-ah hian eng nge danglamna a awm?

3.speaker: female
3.text: Engkim a danglam vek.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Thil pakhat chiah han sawi teh.

3.speaker: female
3.text: A dik chiah.

3.speaker: female
3.text: In luah man ka la pek tho a ngai dawn.

3.speaker: female
3.text: In luah man i la pek tho a ngai dawn.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Simulation-ah pawh hian maw.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Simulation-ah phei chuan a ngai lehzual ang.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Mm.

3.speaker: female
3.text: I nun danah engmah a danglam dawn lo a nih chuan, zan lama i inhrilhfiahna thawnthu mai mai a ni dawn a nih chu.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Thil engkim hi chutiang chu a lo ni vek mai thei asin.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Ka patea i va ang ve.

3.speaker: female
3.text: I patea chu a fing a nih chu.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Ka patea chuan horoscopes a chhiar thin.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Horoscopes te chu simulations an nih kha.

3.speaker: female
3.text: Mu tawh teh.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Tinge mi zawng zawng hi an lo hetiang thut a?

4.speaker: female
4.text: Engtin maw?

4.speaker: female
4.text: Thil thuk deuh deuh (philosophical) sawi reng mai hi.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Eng nge 'reng mai' i tih chu?

4.speaker: female
4.text: Tukinn khan coffee ka lei a, barista khan 'free will' hi a tak i ring em min zawt asin.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Chuan engtin nge i chhan?

4.speaker: female
4.text: Large oat latte ka duh ka ti.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Chhanna ṭha tak a nih chu.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Mahse eng nge a chhan ni ang?

4.speaker: female
4.text: Internet vang a nih kha.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Internet chauh a ni lo.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Internet a ni tlangpui.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Mi zawng zawngin zawhna lian tak tak an zawt a, tuman an chhang bawk si lo.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Tumah hian an hriat loh vang a nih kha.

4.speaker: female
4.text: An hriat loh chuan tinge an zawh si?

4.speaker: female
4.text: Thil fel lo a awm tih hi mite hian an hriat tlat vang a ni mai thei.

4.speaker: female
4.text: Engtin nge a fel loh?

4.speaker: female
4.text: Ka hre lo. A dik lo a ni mai.

4.speaker: female
4.text: I va han ṭanpui hlawk ve.

4.speaker: female
4.text: I zawt miau alawm.

5.speaker: female
5.text: AI thil vel hi a nih ka ring.

5.speaker: female
5.text: Tinge mi zawng zawng hi an inngaihtuah thutak tak?

5.speaker: female
5.text: Engtin nge chu chu AI thil a nih?

5.speaker: female
5.text: Keimahni ang chiaha ṭawng thei kan siam a, tunah chuan eng hian nge 'mihring' min nihtir tih kan hre tawh lo a nih hi.

5.speaker: female
5.text: Kei chu eng hian nge 'keimah' min nihtir tih ka hria alawm.

5.speaker: female
5.text: Hun i duh chen chen hmang rawh.

5.speaker: female
5.text: Thu lian tak a nih chu.

5.speaker: female
5.text: Ui ka ni i ti em ni?

5.speaker: female
5.text: Ka sawi tum chu tumahin he sentence hi an thiam tawh lo a, chu chu a buaina chu a ni.

6.speaker: female
6.text: Thil pakhat ka hrilh thei che em?

6.speaker: female
6.text: Tum renga chhiar i tihna em ni?

6.speaker: female
6.text: Ka hrilhhai deuh a, internet hian a tibuai zual ting si a.

6.speaker: female
6.text: Chuan philosophers-te pawh kha an lo hrilhhai ve vek tho a.

6.speaker: female
6.text: Chanchin duhawm loh a nih chu.

6.speaker: female
6.text: Chanchin ṭha deuh a ni zawk mai thei.

6.speaker: female
6.text: Mihring lo piang tawh zawng zawnga fing ber berte pawhin an lo hrethiam lo a nih chuan, keimah chauh ka ni lo tihna a ni mai.

6.speaker: female
6.text: I awm nuam lo tih ka lo hre miah lo a.

6.speaker: female
6.text: Ka awm nuam lo pawh a ni lo.

6.speaker: female
6.text: Thil hrang daih a nih chu.

7.speaker: female
7.text: Thil mak deuh ka zawt thei che em?

7.speaker: female
7.text: Kan titi apiangin i sawi dan ziah a nih kha.

7.speaker: female
7.text: Nangmah hi ka zawt che alawm.

7.speaker: female
7.text: Chhiar vak lo. Ka naupan laiin ka chhiar thin a.

7.speaker: female
7.text: Bible i chhiar ṭan a maw?

7.speaker: female
7.text: Ka hre lo. Ni a lo tawp a, engmah ei lo ang mai hian ka awm tlat thin a.

7.speaker: female
7.text: Ka fiam che a ni lo a nia.

7.speaker: female
7.text: I fiam ka ring tlat a.

7.speaker: female
7.text: Fiam lo e. Sawi chhunzawm rawh.

8.speaker: female
8.text: Bible chu. Eng nge i hlawkpui?

8.speaker: female
8.text: Kha chauh kha maw i chhanna?

8.speaker: female
8.text: A then chu a ni mai.

8.speaker: female
8.text: Muang chu a ṭha em ni?

8.speaker: female
8.text: Muang hi a danglam alawm. Thil dang zawng zawng hi a chak lutuk a.

8.speaker: female
8.text: Chuan engmah min zawrh a tum ve lo.

8.speaker: female
8.text: Thil englo chu a hralh ve che a ni lo’m ni?

8.speaker: female
8.text: Hetiang 'lei-rawh' tih ang thil hi a ni lo.

8.speaker: female
8.text: Chuan — ka hre lo. Kum sang tam tak chhung mite hian an lo hnial tawh a, mahse a la awm reng si.

8.speaker: female
8.text: Thil tam tak a la awm reng alawm.

8.speaker: female
8.text: Hetiang em em hi chu a ni lo.

8.speaker: female
8.text: …Aw, a dik alawm. Hetiang hi chu a ni lo.

9.speaker: female
9.text: Mahse buaina pakhat ka nei deuh a.

9.speaker: female
9.text: Mite hian hriamhrei angin an hmang thin a.

9.speaker: female
9.text: Chuan an ṭawng ring hle bawk a.

9.speaker: female
9.text: A ṭawng ring ber berte hi an ni ziah alawm.

9.speaker: female
9.text: A nih chuan tinge chhiar a ngaih kher?

9.speaker: female
9.text: A chhan chu ṭawng ringte kha lehkhabu kha an nih loh vang a ni.

9.speaker: female
9.text: Band tin hi an fan zia lo ber hmanga ka teh vek a nih chuan, eng hla mah ka ngaithla thei tawh lo ang.

9.speaker: female
9.text: I sawi dik leh khawp mai.

9.speaker: female
9.text: A chang chuan ka sawi dik ve thin alawm.

10.speaker: female
10.text: Mahse tinge a pawimawh kher a?

10.speaker: female
10.text: Thil zawng zawng hi. Bible hi. Ring lo tute tan pawh hian.

10.speaker: female
10.text: I rin kher a ngai lo, i nun a siam danglam tho alawm.

10.speaker: female
10.text: A awmzia chu i thutiam i vawn thinte, i ṭawngkam hman thinte, thil ṭha i tih leh thil sual i tihte hi — a tam zawk hi chu hemi aṭanga lo chhuak hi a ni alawm.

10.speaker: female
10.text: Inhrilhfiahna nep tak a nih chu.

10.speaker: female
10.text: A hlui tawh vanga pawimawh i ti a nih chu.

10.speaker: female
10.text: Tui kan in ang hian a khat vek ka tihna a nih chu.

10.speaker: female
10.text: Chuan thil dang leh chu — internet aiin zawhna ṭha zawk min zawt niin ka hria.

10.speaker: female
10.text: Zawhna hniam tak a nih chu.

10.speaker: female
10.text: Eng atana piang nge i nih? Tute lakah nge ba i neih? I hun hi engtin nge i hman dawn?

11.speaker: female
11.text: Chuan, tunah hian inkhawm turin min sawm dawn em ni?

11.speaker: female
11.text: Khatiang chu ka ti lo ang.

11.speaker: female
11.text: I inkhawm a nih chuan i duh vanga kal tur i ni a, thutphahah ka lo nawr tlat vanga kal tur i ni lo.

11.speaker: female
11.text: A nih chuan ka lo awm ang.

11.speaker: female
11.text: Simulation-ah khan kan la awm reng em?

11.speaker: female
11.text: Chips kha min lo pe teh.

11.speaker: female
11.text: Pali chu min lo pe hrim hrim rawh.
